_readme: Per-chain deployment config, keyed by chainId. Copy to bcConfig.json and fill in. rvToken.address: existing revenue/escrow token (for Arc testnet this is native USDC ERC-20 @ 0x3600..0000, 6 decimals); leave empty to use the per-chain default (arcTestnet -> Arc USDC) or, on chains without a default, have scripts/deploy.js deploy the bundled RevenueToken mock (local/test chains only). REVENUE_TOKEN_ADDRESS env overrides this on any chain. params: ACTMarketplaceEVM initializer values. scripts/deploy.js writes the deployed marketplace address + ABI back into this file.

5042002._note: Arc (Circle) testnet. Native gas token is USDC. RPC comes from the ARC_TESTNET_RPC_URL env var (default https://rpc.testnet.arc.network). rvToken.address left empty -> scripts/deploy.js uses the cited Arc native USDC ERC-20 (0x3600..0000, 6 decimals) from docs.arc.io/arc/references/contract-addresses; set REVENUE_TOKEN_ADDRESS to override. Explorer: https://testnet.arcscan.app. Faucet: https://faucet.circle.com (select Arc Testnet).
